news.headline: China's Wang Yi: Global challenges require China and the US to work together.
EON CEO warns of growing threat to European energy security.
NY Giants seek to sell part of team, hire Moelis to manage process.
Change made to rules in Dowlais Group plc - Form 8.5 (EPT/RI).
OraSure to report Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 25 at 5pm ET.
news.summary: OraSure Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSUR), based in Bethlehem, Pennsylvania, announced that they will host their quarterly earnings conference call to discuss their fourth quarter financial results for 2024 and other key business updates. The call is set to take place on February 25, 2025, at 5 p.m. ET. This conference call will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's performance in the final quarter of 2024 and highlight significant developments within the organization.

news.headline: Artelo Biosciences presents new data on ART12.11 tablets at IMCCB-25, showing improved pharmacokinetics to Epidiolex®.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Artelo Biosciences, Inc. disclosed nonclinical results for ART12.11, a unique combination of cannabidiol (CBD) and tetramethylpyrazine (TMP), at the International Medical Cannabis Conference (IMCCB-25) in Switzerland. Professor Saoirse O’Sullivan, Vice President of Translational Science at Artelo Biosciences, presented the findings at the event held on February 13-14, 2025, at the University of Bern. The company, traded on Nasdaq under ARTL, specializes in developing therapies for cancer, pain, dermatological, and neurological disorders by modulating lipid-signaling pathways.

news.headline: Juve Stabia excels in Serie B with highest financial efficiency, lowest wage bill per point this season.
news.summary: In Serie B this season, Juve Stabia stands out as the most economically effective club, with the lowest wage bill per point compared to other teams. This indicates their ability to achieve success on the field while maintaining financial efficiency. Juve Stabia's performance highlights their smart management of resources, with their effective strategy allowing them to maximize results with minimal investment in player salaries. This statistic demonstrates their impressive balance between financial prudence and on-pitch performance, setting them apart from their competitors in Serie B.

news.headline: IN8bio presents promising phase 1 data at TCT 2025, emphasizing excellent remission durability in high-risk AML patients.
news.summary: IN8bio showcased encouraging results from their Phase 1 clinical trial at the Transplantation and Cellular Therapy (TCT) conference in 2025. The data revealed a notable long-lasting response in high-risk Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) patients. This indicates promising efficacy of the treatment with regards to sustaining remissions. The presentation emphasized the robustness of the outcomes, demonstrating the potential of the therapy in addressing this challenging form of AML.

news.headline: Rocky Mountain High Brands signs a multi-year, multi-million dollar contract to produce a new product in DIY industry.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Rocky Mountain High Brands, Inc. (OTC: RMHB) disclosed the confirmation of a fresh, extensive contract worth millions of dollars that spans multiple years. The agreement involves the production of a groundbreaking product that is rapidly gaining traction in the Do It Yourself sector and is redefining high-volume commercial uses.

news.headline: Lottery.com acquires lottery management system from PlusEVO Ltd., aiming to enhance international expansion in digital lottery and sports entertainment.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in Fort Worth, Texas, Lottery.com Inc. (Nasdaq: LTRY, LTRYW) revealed that it has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with PlusEVO Ltd. to purchase an advanced lottery management system and gaming platform. This move is aimed at boosting its global expansion initiatives. The platform, which can cater to various gaming needs such as lottery and sweepstakes, is crafted to offer users a personalized experience in compliance with all regulatory standards. This strategic partnership marks Lottery.com's commitment to enhancing its technological capabilities and widening its market reach.

news.headline: Longeveron will be presenting at the Emerging Growth Virtual Conference on Feb 19, 2025. Save the date!
news.summary: In April, the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 6%, with 916,000 jobs added to the economy. This is the lowest unemployment rate since the start of the pandemic last year. The leisure and hospitality industry saw the largest increase in jobs, with 280,000 new positions. These positive numbers indicate a strong recovery in the labor market as more businesses reopen and vaccinations increase. The drop in unemployment is a hopeful sign for the economy as it continues to recover from the impacts of the pandemic.

news.headline: DLR Kredit A/S has scheduled financial statement publication and general meeting for 2025.
news.summary: DLR Kredit A/S has established the timetable for key events in 2025, which include the disclosure of financial statements and the convening of the annual general meeting. The financial statements are scheduled to be published on specific dates in the year, along with the ordinary general meeting to discuss them. These important events are crucial for stakeholders as they provide insights into the financial performance of the company. Keeping track of these dates is essential for investors and shareholders to stay informed about the company's progress.

news.headline: AVITA Medical hosting investor webinar on Feb 18, 2025 at 2:00PM PT for shareholders and prospective investors.
news.summary: AVITA Medical is hosting an investor webinar and presentation on February 18, 2025, at 2:00 PM PT. The event is open to shareholders and potential investors interested in learning more about the company's developments and future plans.

news.headline: Q-Gold to explore Mine Centre Project with diamond drill program after successful financing, following up on high-grade gold results from 2022. Company press release available on SEDAR+ profile.
news.summary: In Toronto on February 14, 2025, Q-Gold Resources Ltd (TSXV: QGR, OTC: QGLDF) announced plans to use funds from recent oversubscribed financings to begin a diamond drill program. This program aims to follow up on promising gold findings from the 2022 drill campaign at the Mine Centre Project in the Mine Centre Camp. The Company will utilize the proceeds from both flow-through and non-flow-through financings for this exploration initiative. More details on the financings can be found in the press release dated December 27, 2024, accessible on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca.

news.headline: Tanishq shines at NY Fashion Week with Designer Bibhu Mohapatra, displaying 40+ pieces from collection.
news.summary: On February 10, 2025, Tanishq, the biggest jewelry brand in India, marked its first appearance at New York Fashion Week in partnership with designer Bibhu Mohapatra. The event featured more than 40 stunning pieces from their latest collection, resulting in 20 unique collaborations displayed.

news.headline: Our Kids Read opens nation's first Free Diverse Children's Bookstore in Baltimore, grand opening on Feb 15 at Eastpoint Mall.
news.summary: The grand opening of the nation's initial Free Diverse Children's Bookstore at Eastpoint Mall in Baltimore is scheduled for February 15, 2025. Our Kids Read (OKR), a nonprofit group committed to enhancing literacy among underprivileged kids, will host the event.

news.headline: South Korea loyalty programs market to reach $1.83 billion by 2025 with dominant players like OK Cashback and CJ ONE.
news.summary: A recent report on the loyalty programs market in South Korea predicts significant growth, with the market expected to increase by 15.5% annually, reaching a value of US$1.83 billion by 2025. Over time, the loyalty market in South Korea has shown a compound annual growth rate of 17%. This data includes over 50 key performance indicators on loyalty programs trends across various end-use sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. The report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com for further insights.

IASO Bio's new drug Equecabtagene Autoleucel has been accepted by Hong Kong Department of Health's New Drug Application.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, IASO Biotherapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company based in Shanghai and Nanjing, China, along with San Jose, Calif., revealed their focus on developing and commercializing cutting-edge cell therapies and biologics. The company is dedicated to discovering new treatments, with a strong emphasis on research, development, and manufacturing of these innovative medical solutions.

news.headline: Trade Desk's Kokai Rollout faces setbacks, casting doubts on prior claims of success - TTD (NASDAQ: TTD).
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in San Francisco, The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTD), a leading advertising technology company, enthusiastically highlighted the significant advantages of its latest Kokai platform. The company indicated strong initial performance results and hinted at potential additional expansion.

news.headline: GoDaddy reports Q4 earnings of $1.36/share, misses estimate; sales at $1.192 billion, beating estimate. Analysts raise forecasts.
news.summary: GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE:GDDY) announced fourth-quarter earnings that fell short of expectations, with earnings of $1.36 per share, below the analyst estimate of $1.43 per share. However, the company exceeded sales expectations, reporting quarterly sales of $1.192 billion compared to the estimated $1.179 billion. CEO Aman Bhutani expressed positivity about the company's strong operational and financial performance in 2024, highlighting progress in key initiatives. Looking forward to 2025, GoDaddy aims to continue innovating with GoDaddy Airo.

news.headline: Avertix Medical's Guardian System proves cost-effective for high-risk ACS patients, per new data.
news.summary: In Eatontown, New Jersey on February 14, 2025, Avertix Medical, Inc. unveiled significant findings related to The Guardian® system. This innovative technology marks the debut of the first real-time, continuous heart attack detection and patient alerting system globally. The new data reinforces the efficacy of The Guardian® system in detecting and alerting patients to potential heart attacks instantly.

news.headline: AESC ranks fourth in 2024 global energy storage cell shipments, per InfoLink Consulting, marking rapid growth.
news.summary: Located in Yokohama, Japan, AESC is a prominent player in high-performance battery technology and has been recognized as one of the leading companies in the global energy storage sector as per the 2024 Non-China Markets’ Energy Storage Cell Shipment Ranking by InfoLink Consulting. This report, which encompasses utility-scale, commercial & industry, and residential applications, positions AESC among the top firms in the industry. The achievement underscores AESC's swift growth and success in the sector.

news.headline: Vitalik advocates for raising ETH gas limit to enhance resistance, reduce costs between L2s, and offer disaster protection.
news.summary: Increasing Ethereum's gas limit would enhance its ability to resist censorship, lower expenses when transferring assets between Layer 2 solutions, and serve as a safety measure during emergencies, as per Buterin's comments. The adjustment can potentially increase the current gas limit from approximately 15 million to 20 million, offering more capacity for transactions on the blockchain network. This move aims to improve the overall efficiency and flexibility of Ethereum, making it more robust and reliable for users and developers.

news.headline: NY Giants seek to sell a minority stake in the NFL team with the help of Moelis & Co..
DexCom (NASDAQ: DXCM) Q4 earnings miss, with sales of $1.140 billion beating expectations. Analysts increase forecasts.
news.summary: DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ:DXCM) disclosed a fourth-quarter earnings report that fell short of expectations. The company's earnings stood at 45 cents per share, which was below the projected 50 cents per share. Despite this, DexCom reported quarterly sales of $1.140 billion, surpassing the anticipated $1.104 billion. DexCom's chairman, president, and CEO, Kevin Sayer, mentioned the company's significant milestones in 2024, such as a substantial expansion of their US commercial sales force, the launch of Dexcom One+ and Stelo, and the submission of their G7 15-day product to the FDA. Looking ahead to 2025, DexCom is optimistic about its future prospects. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Report predicts growth in the autonomous vehicle market by 2025-2030 with opportunities for ICT solutions.
news.summary: A report titled "Autonomous Vehicle Market by Autonomy Level, Powertrain Type, Components, Supporting Technologies, and ICT Infrastructure 2025 - 2030" has been recently incorporated into ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report analyzes the AV market and predicts its growth between 2025 and 2030 across various segments and regions. It offers forecasts for the global and regional autonomous vehicle market encompassing hardware, software, and other components. The report provides insights into the market based on autonomy levels, powertrain types, components, supporting technologies, and ICT infrastructure.

news.headline: SEC considers Grayscale's applications for Dogecoin and XRP ETFs, signaling possible approval; shift from dismissing altcoin ETFs.
news.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission has recognized Grayscale's applications for spot Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) ETFs, indicating a shift in its approach towards considering proposals for alternative cryptocurrencies. This move is significant as historically, the SEC has been hesitant to approve cryptocurrency ETFs beyond Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH). If approved, these ETFs would provide investors with the opportunity to access Dogecoin and XRP through traditional financial markets without directly owning the assets. Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas views the SEC's engagement with the filings as a positive sign of potential evolution in its stance on cryptocurrency ETFs. Fox Business journalist Eleanor Terrett also highlighted the importance of this development.

news.headline: JD Vance criticizes Europe's lack of shared democratic values in Munich speech.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has reached 200,000, with a significant rise seen in the past week alone. Additionally, the death toll has surpassed 5,000, marking a grim milestone in the ongoing pandemic. Authorities are emphasizing the importance of adhering to safety guidelines and getting vaccinated to curb the spread of the virus. The healthcare system is under immense strain, with hospitals operating at 95% capacity, leading to concerns about the ability to provide adequate care to all patients. Efforts are underway to ramp up vaccination distribution and increase public awareness about the severity of the situation.

news.headline: UK-listed investment trusts remain resilient, despite challenges. Stay optimistic about their future. #Bloomberg #UKInvesting
China's Wang Yi: Protectionism offers no way out and arbitrary tariffs produce no winners.

IAEA Chief Grossi: We shouldn't waste more time and must refocus on Iran.
Home insurance stocks are taking hits from California fires, with losses from fires and hurricanes affecting the industry. Investors are left to cover the bill, although some positives may help.
news.summary: Insurance companies are facing challenges due to losses from wildfires and hurricanes. Despite this, there are some positive developments for the industry. Home insurance stocks have been hit hard by losses from the California fires, raising concerns about the financial burden on investors.

news.headline: Moderna's stock drops by 94% despite light fourth-quarter profit. Mixed report causes early skid in stock.
news.summary: Moderna, a leading Covid vaccine manufacturer, released its fourth-quarter report on Friday, which revealed mixed results. Following this announcement, Moderna's stock experienced a decline in early trading. The report highlighted a modest fourth-quarter profit, adding to the company's overall 94% decrease. This update was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: MacKenzie Realty Capital reports Q2 FY 2025 financial results: FFO returns to positive $2.8 million. Net revenue up 124% to $8.0 million.
news.summary: MacKenzie Realty Capital, Inc. reported its financial results for the second quarter ending December 31, 2024. The company had a positive $2.8 million in funds from operations (FFO) for the quarter, with a net loss of $4.5 million offset by $2.2 million in depreciation expense and $5.1 million in impairment loss. Revenue for the quarter was boosted by a $3.0 million early termination fee from the anchor tenant at MacKenzie Satellite Place. Net revenues for the quarter were $8.0 million, a 124% increase from the same period in 2023. Net operating income also saw a significant increase to $6.3 million, up 205% from the previous year. However, the company experienced a net loss of $4.5 million, compared to a $1.6 million loss in the same period in 2023. The company also paid a common stock quarterly dividend of $0.05 per share.

news.headline: Dexcom stock recovers after fourth-quarter letdown with missed profit expectations.
news.summary: After falling short of fourth-quarter profit expectations, Dexcom stock saw a recovery on Friday. The diabetes devices maker experienced a turnaround, with their stock bouncing back. This development comes following a period of disappointment in their financial performance, indicating a positive shift in investor sentiment. The exact numbers regarding the extent of the recovery and the initial fall in stock value are significant but not specifically mentioned in the rephrased content.

news.headline: CyberArk's Q4 revenue grows 41% to $314.40 million, beats estimate. CEO: Record performance in 2024 driven by strong demand for identity security solutions. Analysts optimistic, boost forecasts.
news.summary: CyberArk Software Ltd (NASDAQ:CYBR) released its fiscal fourth-quarter results, surpassing expectations. The company saw a 41% increase in revenue from last year, reaching $314.40 million, exceeding the projected $301.31 million. Their adjusted EPS stood at 80 cents, outstripping the anticipated 72 cents. According to CyberArk’s CEO, Matt Cohen, the company had a strong performance in 2024, driven by the high demand for their identity security solutions. The total Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) hit $1.169 billion, with organic ARR surpassing $1 billion and boosted by Venafi's performance. Additionally, CyberArk achieved a notable milestone by returning to the Rule of 40 on a full-year basis, showcasing vigorous revenue growth and free cash flow margin.

news.headline: Nvidia sold 3 tech stocks, bought stakes in 2, like SoundHound, and trimmed Arm stake. Stock performed steady.
news.summary: In a regulatory filing on Friday, Nvidia revealed that it sold off shares in three technology stocks and increased investments in two others. While Nvidia's stock remained relatively steady, the company made significant moves in its portfolio. This included divesting from SoundHound and reducing its stake in Arm, while acquiring positions in two new stocks. The details of these changes were not disclosed, but Nvidia's strategic adjustments in its investment portfolio indicate a shift in its financial strategy.

news.headline: Best's Review article discusses the shift in insurers towards innovation culture, focusing on personal auto sector as a pioneer. Executives from Hartford Steam Boiler Group and American Family Life Insurance share insights.
news.summary: In the latest February issue, Best’s Review delves into the shifting landscape where innovation has transitioned from a luxury to a vital component for insurers today. The piece titled “Insurers Discover Value in Innovation Culture” delves into the advantages of embracing innovation, with personal auto leading the way in pioneering processes. The article also highlights the correlation between innovation and increased premium growth. Additionally, it showcases insights from executives at Hartford Steam Boiler Group and American Family Life Insurance.

news.headline: IAEA Chief: Iran's stockpile of uranium enriched to up to 60% will be closer to 250 kg by time of next report to March board meeting.
UN Nuclear Watchdog Chief Grossi: The time running out get a deal on Iran's nuclear programme.
The Russian government and oil producers will next week discuss full gasoline export ban from March 1st - Sources.
Tallgrass and Bridger Pipeline open season for Pony Express Pipeline starts Feb 14, 2025, with 30-day duration.
news.summary: Today, Tallgrass Pony Express Pipeline, LLC (Pony Express) and Bridger Pipeline, LLC (Bridger) unveiled a joint tariff open season offering incentive rates for crude oil transportation from Bridger's Guernsey Hub using available Pony Express capacity. The open season, starting on February 14, 2025, will last 30 days. Interested shippers can participate in this program by committing to the provided tariff rates.
